dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6247 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 13355 North Lon Adams Road in Marana, Arizona, as the “Mayor Ed Honea Memorial Post Office”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Ciscomani (for himself, Mr. Stanton, Ms. Ansari, Mr. Biggs of Arizona, Mr. Crane, Mr. Gosar, Mrs. Grijalva, Mr. Hamadeh of Arizona, and Mr. Schweikert) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 13355 North Lon Adams Road in Marana, Arizona, as the Mayor Ed Honea Memorial Post Office.

section.header: Mayor Ed Honea Memorial Post Office

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 13355 North Lon Adams Road in Marana, Arizona, shall be known and designated as the Mayor Ed Honea Memorial Post Office.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Mayor Ed Honea Memorial Post Office.
